openmeter/watermill/driver/kafka.purpose: Provides NewPublisher and NewSubscriber factories over IBM Sarama + watermill-kafka with SASL/SSL auth, OTel tracing, partition-key routing, and OTel metrics bridging. All Sarama internals are hidden behind these two constructors; callers receive a watermill.Publisher or message.Subscriber.

patterns.name: BrokerOptions as shared config root
patterns.description: Both PublisherOptions and SubscriberOptions embed BrokerOptions. Call Validate() before any construction — it checks ClientID, Logger, and MetricMeter are non-nil.
patterns.example: if err := o.Broker.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, err }

patterns.name: Role suffix on ClientID
patterns.description: createKafkaConfig(role) appends the role string ('publisher' or 'subscriber') to ClientID so Kafka broker logs distinguish producers from consumers.

patterns.name: OTel tracing via kafka.NewOTELSaramaTracer()
patterns.description: PublisherConfig always sets Tracer: kafka.NewOTELSaramaTracer(). Relies on the global trace provider; do not pass a custom tracer.

patterns.name: Partition-key routing via marshalerWithPartitionKey
patterns.description: Publisher always uses marshalerWithPartitionKey{} (wraps DefaultMarshaler). Set msg.Metadata[PartitionKeyMetadataKey] = subject to route to a partition. Subscriber uses DefaultMarshaler.

patterns.name: SaramaMetricRenamer drops per-broker/topic cardinality
patterns.description: Metrics containing 'for-broker' or 'for-topic' substrings are dropped; others are prefixed with 'sarama.' and tagged with {role}. New metrics must fit this filter or add an explicit Drop rule.
patterns.example: SaramaMetricRenamer(role) is passed to metrics.NewRegistry as NameTransformFn.

patterns.name: Topic provisioning before publisher creation
patterns.description: TopicProvisioner.Provision(ctx, topics...) is called inside NewPublisher before kafka.NewPublisher. Topics must exist before the publisher is returned.
patterns.example: if err = in.TopicProvisioner.Provision(ctx, in.ProvisionTopics...); err != nil { return nil, err }

key_file_guides.role: Defines BrokerOptions and createKafkaConfig — the shared sarama.Config builder. All SASL/TLS, metric registry, and ClientID logic lives here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: MetricMeter must not be nil — metrics.NewRegistry returns an error if it is. createKafkaConfig always sets config.ApiVersionsRequest = false to suppress log spam.

key_file_guides.role: NewPublisher: validates options, calls createKafkaConfig("publisher"), provisions topics, then constructs kafka.Publisher.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Always use marshalerWithPartitionKey{} — using kafka.DefaultMarshaler{} silently breaks partition routing.

key_file_guides.role: NewSubscriber: validates options, calls createKafkaConfig("subscriber"), sets defaultMaxProcessingTime (5 min), constructs kafka.Subscriber.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Subscriber uses kafka.DefaultMarshaler{} (not marshalerWithPartitionKey) — that is intentional. ConsumerGroupName must not be empty.

key_file_guides.role: marshalerWithPartitionKey wraps DefaultMarshaler to promote PartitionKeyMetadataKey from message metadata to sarama.ProducerMessage.Key. AddPartitionKeyFromSubject is the helper to set the metadata.
key_file_guides.watch_for: The metadata key is stripped from Kafka headers after promotion to avoid double-encoding.

key_file_guides.role: SaramaMetricRenamer returns a TransformMetricsNameToOtel function that drops per-broker/topic metrics and prefixes survivors with 'sarama.'.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Per-broker and per-topic metric names are dropped unconditionally — do not rely on them for observability.

key_file_guides.role: XDGSCRAMClient implements sarama.SCRAMClient for SCRAM-SHA-256/512 SASL mechanisms.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Only used when SecurityProtocol == SASL_SSL and SaslMechanisms is SCRAM-SHA-256 or SCRAM-SHA-512.

key_file_guides.role: SaramaLoggerAdaptor bridges sarama's Logger interface to slog — both sarama.Logger and sarama.DebugLogger are set inside createKafkaConfig.
key_file_guides.watch_for: These are global sarama variables; setting them affects all sarama clients in the process.

anti_patterns: Building *sarama.Config directly instead of calling createKafkaConfig — SASL/TLS, metric registry, and ClientID suffix are all missing
Using kafka.DefaultMarshaler{} in PublisherConfig — partition-key routing silently stops working
Skipping TopicProvisioner.Provision before publishing — topics may not exist in the Kafka cluster
Setting a nil MetricMeter in BrokerOptions — metrics.NewRegistry returns an error and construction fails
Adding per-broker or per-topic metric labels without a Drop rule in SaramaMetricRenamer — creates unbounded OTel label cardinality

decisions.decision: marshalerWithPartitionKey wraps DefaultMarshaler rather than replacing it
decisions.rationale: Reuses all existing serialisation logic; only adds the key-promotion step, keeping the delta minimal and auditable.

decisions.decision: OTel metrics registry injected into sarama.Config.MetricRegistry
decisions.rationale: Bridges Sarama's go-metrics interface to OTel without patching Sarama; SaramaMetricRenamer drops high-cardinality names before they reach the exporter.

decisions.decision: Topic provisioning is a Publisher-side responsibility, not caller responsibility
decisions.rationale: Callers pass ProvisionTopics in PublisherOptions; NewPublisher ensures topics exist before the publisher is usable, preventing publish-time errors.

code_examples.scenario: Construct a Publisher with SASL_SSL and OTel metrics
